name: forgeflow-mini
description: Brain-driven development plugin — persistent knowledge, context-aware planning, subagent dispatch

skills.name: brain-dev
skills.description: Smart router — classifies intent, scores complexity, routes to the right skill

skills.name: brain-map
skills.description: Context loader — assembles .brain/ context using 3-tier weighted retrieval

skills.name: brain-plan
skills.description: Planner — generates TDD implementation plans with interactive Q&A

skills.name: brain-task
skills.description: Implementer — executes plans via subagent dispatch or inline for trivial tasks

skills.name: brain-verify
skills.description: Verifier — 6-phase verification checklist (build, types, lint, tests, security, diff)

skills.name: brain-document
skills.description: Documenter — proposes sinapse updates and captures episodes after task completion

skills.name: brain-consult
skills.description: Consultant — brain-informed Q&A in quick, research, or consensus mode

skills.name: brain-config
skills.description: Config & initialization — initialize brain for new projects or edit brain.config.json

skills.name: brain-health
skills.description: Dashboard & consolidation — view brain metrics, process episodes, manage sinapses
